feat.name: Animist's Power
feat.special: You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another animist feat.
feat.text: You gain one animist feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your animist level is equal to half your character level. You can’t use this feat to gain animist feats with the wandering trait.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
